services.description: Manage Azure Hybrid Connectivity endpoints and solution configurations for Arc-enabled resources.
services.detailedDescription: Azure Hybrid Connectivity enables remote access and management of Arc-enabled resources (servers, Kubernetes clusters) through relay endpoints. Covers endpoints, service configurations (SSH, RDP), public cloud connectors (AWS/GCP), solution configurations, and solution types.

resourceDescriptions.endpoint: Connectivity endpoints on Arc-enabled resources for SSH, RDP, and relay access
resourceDescriptions.serviceconfiguration: Service configurations defining allowed protocols on an endpoint
resourceDescriptions.publiccloudconnector: Public cloud connectors for AWS and GCP integration with Azure Arc
resourceDescriptions.solutionconfiguration: Solution configurations for hybrid connectivity scenarios
resourceDescriptions.solutiontype: Available solution types for hybrid connectivity
resourceDescriptions.inventory: Inventory of resources managed through a solution configuration

resourceDetailedDescriptions.endpoint: Create and manage connectivity endpoints on Arc-enabled resources. List credentials and ingress gateway credentials for establishing SSH or RDP sessions through the Arc relay.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.serviceconfiguration: Configure which services (SSH port 22, RDP port 3389) are allowed through a hybrid connectivity endpoint.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.publiccloudconnector: Create connectors that link AWS or GCP accounts to Azure for multi-cloud inventory and management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.solutionconfiguration: Create and manage solution configurations that define how Arc-enabled resources participate in hybrid connectivity scenarios.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.solutiontype: Enumerate available hybrid connectivity solution types supported by the platform.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.inventory: List resources discovered and managed through a solution configuration.

services.description: Manage Azure Arc-enabled VMware vSphere resources and virtual machines.
services.detailedDescription: Azure Arc for VMware vSphere: connect vCenter servers to Azure and manage VMs, templates, networks, and compute through the Azure control plane. Covers vCenter onboarding, VM lifecycle (start/stop/restart), VMSS guest agents, and resource inventory synchronization.

resourceDescriptions.vcenter: vCenter Server connections linked to Azure Arc
resourceDescriptions.virtualmachineinstance: Arc-enabled VMware virtual machine instances with start/stop/restart operations
resourceDescriptions.virtualmachinetemplate: VM templates from vCenter available for deployment
resourceDescriptions.virtualnetwork: VMware virtual networks exposed through Arc
resourceDescriptions.cluster: VMware clusters available as compute resources
resourceDescriptions.host: VMware hosts available as compute resources
resourceDescriptions.datastore: VMware datastores available for VM storage
resourceDescriptions.resourcepool: VMware resource pools for compute allocation
resourceDescriptions.inventoryitem: Discovered vCenter inventory items not yet projected to Azure
resourceDescriptions.vminstanceguestagent: Guest agents installed on Arc-enabled VMware VMs
resourceDescriptions.hybrididentitymetadata: Hybrid identity metadata for Arc-enabled VMware VMs

resourceDetailedDescriptions.vcenter: Onboard vCenter Servers to Azure Arc and manage the connection. Creates a bridge between the vCenter inventory and Azure resource management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualmachineinstance: Manage VMware VMs through Azure: create, update, delete, start, stop, and restart VMs. The VM instance is a child resource of a Kubernetes connected cluster Arc resource.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualmachinetemplate: Project VM templates from vCenter to Azure for use in VM deployments.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualnetwork: Project VMware virtual networks to Azure for network segment management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.cluster: Project VMware clusters to Azure for use as compute placement targets.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.host: Project VMware ESXi hosts to Azure for direct placement of VMs.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.datastore: Project VMware datastores to Azure for storage management and placement.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.resourcepool: Project VMware resource pools to Azure for compute quota management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.inventoryitem: Manage vCenter inventory items that have been discovered but not yet projected to Azure as Arc resources.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.vminstanceguestagent: Manage guest agents on Arc-enabled VMware VMs for extension and patch management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.hybrididentitymetadata: View hybrid identity metadata for Arc-enabled VMware VMs including the public key used for authentication.

services.description: Manage Azure Arc-enabled System Center Virtual Machine Manager (SCVMM) resources.
services.detailedDescription: Azure Arc for SCVMM: connect VMM servers to Azure and manage Hyper-V VMs, templates, virtual networks, clouds, and availability sets through the Azure control plane. Covers VMM server onboarding, VM lifecycle with checkpoints, and inventory management.

resourceDescriptions.vmmserver: VMM Server connections linked to Azure Arc
resourceDescriptions.virtualmachineinstance: Arc-enabled SCVMM virtual machine instances with start/stop/checkpoint operations
resourceDescriptions.virtualmachinetemplate: VM templates from VMM available for deployment
resourceDescriptions.virtualnetwork: VMM virtual networks exposed through Arc
resourceDescriptions.cloud: VMM clouds representing capacity pools for VM placement
resourceDescriptions.availabilityset: VMM availability sets for high-availability VM placement
resourceDescriptions.inventoryitem: Discovered VMM inventory items not yet projected to Azure
resourceDescriptions.guestagent: Guest agents on Arc-enabled SCVMM VMs
resourceDescriptions.vminstancehybrididentitymetadata: Hybrid identity metadata for Arc-enabled SCVMM VMs

resourceDetailedDescriptions.vmmserver: Onboard SCVMM servers to Azure Arc and manage the VMM connection. Enables Azure-based management of the full VMM-managed infrastructure.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualmachineinstance: Manage SCVMM-hosted Hyper-V VMs through Azure: create, update, delete, start, stop, restart. Create, restore, and delete VM checkpoints for point-in-time recovery.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualmachinetemplate: Project SCVMM VM templates to Azure for use in VM deployments.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.virtualnetwork: Project SCVMM virtual networks to Azure for network management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.cloud: Project SCVMM clouds (capacity pools) to Azure for placement and quota management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.availabilityset: Project SCVMM availability sets to Azure for high-availability VM placement.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.inventoryitem: Manage VMM inventory items that have been discovered but not yet projected to Azure.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.guestagent: Manage guest agents on Arc-enabled SCVMM VMs for extension and patch management.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.vminstancehybrididentitymetadata: View hybrid identity metadata for Arc-enabled SCVMM VMs.

services.description: Manage Azure billing accounts, profiles, invoice sections, invoices, and subscriptions.
services.detailedDescription: Covers the full Azure billing hierarchy: billing accounts, billing profiles, invoice sections, customers, subscriptions, invoices, products, reservations, payment methods, and role assignments. Supports EA, MCA, MPA, and CSP account types. Requires Billing Account Reader/Contributor or Profile Reader/Contributor roles.

resourceDescriptions.account: Billing account lifecycle and payment terms
resourceDescriptions.profile: Billing profiles grouping invoice sections for a billing account
resourceDescriptions.invoicesection: Invoice sections for grouping charges within a billing profile
resourceDescriptions.invoice: Billing invoices with download and listing operations
resourceDescriptions.subscription: Billing subscription management (move, cancel, merge, split)
resourceDescriptions.customer: CSP customers under a billing account or profile
resourceDescriptions.product: Billing products (reservations, marketplace) with move operations
resourceDescriptions.reservation: Reservations linked to billing accounts and profiles
resourceDescriptions.paymentmethod: Payment methods associated with billing accounts and profiles
resourceDescriptions.department: EA departments within a billing account
resourceDescriptions.enrollmentaccount: EA enrollment accounts for subscription creation
resourceDescriptions.roleassignment: Billing role assignments for access control
resourceDescriptions.policy: Billing policies for profiles and accounts

resourceDetailedDescriptions.account: List and update billing accounts. Manage payment terms and view invoice sections permitted for subscription creation.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.profile: Create, update, and delete billing profiles. Profiles group invoice sections and control payment methods and invoicing frequency.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.invoicesection: Create and manage invoice sections for organizing charges. Validate delete eligibility before removal.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.invoice: List, download, and amend invoices at the billing account, profile, and subscription level.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.subscription: Transfer, cancel, merge, split, and move billing subscriptions between invoice sections.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.customer: List and manage CSP customers under a billing account or profile.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.product: List, move, and validate movement of billing products such as reservations and marketplace items.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservation: List and update reservations associated with a billing account or profile.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.paymentmethod: List and manage payment methods available for billing accounts and profiles.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.department: List EA departments within a billing account.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.enrollmentaccount: List EA enrollment accounts used for subscription provisioning.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.agreement: List and retrieve billing agreement details.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.roleassignment: Create, delete, and list billing role assignments across account, profile, invoice section, customer, department, and enrollment account scopes.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.roledefinition: List and retrieve billing role definitions available at each billing scope.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.permission: List and check billing permissions for users and service principals.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.policy: Get and update billing policies controlling marketplace purchases, reservation purchases, and Azure savings plan purchases.

services.description: Manage Azure cost consumption data: budgets, usage details, reservations, and price sheets.
services.detailedDescription: Provides usage data, budgets, marketplace charges, reservation recommendations, and price sheets across scopes (subscription, resource group, billing account, management group). Useful for cost monitoring and FinOps workflows. Requires Billing Reader or Cost Management Reader role.

resourceDescriptions.budget: Cost budgets with alert thresholds at any Azure scope
resourceDescriptions.usagedetail: Detailed usage records for Azure resources
resourceDescriptions.reservationrecommendation: Reservation purchase recommendations based on usage
resourceDescriptions.pricesheet: Azure service price sheets for billing periods
resourceDescriptions.charge: Charge records by scope and billing period
resourceDescriptions.event: Billing events for MCA and CSP billing accounts
resourceDescriptions.tag: Available tags for cost analysis filtering

resourceDetailedDescriptions.budget: Create and manage cost budgets. Configure notification thresholds and alert contacts. Budgets can be scoped to subscription, resource group, management group, billing account, or billing profile.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.usagedetail: List detailed usage records including resource consumption, quantities, and costs.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.marketplace: List marketplace (third-party) charge records for a scope.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservationsdetail: List detailed per-instance reservation utilization records for chargeback and utilization analysis.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservationssummary: List daily or monthly aggregated reservation utilization summaries.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservationrecommendation: Get AI-generated recommendations for reservation purchases based on past usage patterns.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservationtransaction: List reservation purchase and refund transactions by billing account or profile.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.pricesheet: Download or retrieve price sheets showing Azure service rates for a billing period.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.charge: List charge details by scope for cost analysis.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.balance: Retrieve EA billing period balance including beginning balance, new purchases, and adjustments.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.event: List credit and charge events such as credit expirations for MCA and CSP billing accounts.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.lot: List Azure pre-purchased credit lots by billing scope.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.tag: Retrieve available resource tags at a scope for use in cost analysis filters.

services.description: Manage Azure Cost Management exports, budgets, queries, alerts, and scheduled actions.
services.detailedDescription: Azure Cost Management for analyzing, monitoring, and optimizing cloud costs. Covers cost exports, cost queries, budgets, alerts, scheduled actions (cost reports), views, benefit utilization summaries, and price sheet downloads. Scope-based operations work across subscriptions, resource groups, management groups, and billing accounts.

resourceDescriptions.export: Cost data exports to Azure Storage on a schedule
resourceDescriptions.budget: Cost budgets with alert thresholds at any scope
resourceDescriptions.alert: Cost alerts triggered by budget thresholds or anomalies
resourceDescriptions.scheduledaction: Scheduled cost report emails and automation
resourceDescriptions.dimension: Available cost dimension values for filtering
resourceDescriptions.benefitutilizationsummary: Benefit utilization summaries for reservations and savings plans
resourceDescriptions.costallocationrule: Cost allocation rules for distributing costs across scopes
resourceDescriptions.pricesheet: Price sheet downloads by billing account or invoice
resourceDescriptions.setting: Cost management settings at subscription/billing scope

resourceDetailedDescriptions.export: Create and manage automated cost data exports to Azure Storage. Configure export schedule, date range, and target storage container.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.budget: Create and manage cost budgets at any scope. Configure alert thresholds and notification contacts.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.query: Run ad-hoc cost queries with grouping, filtering, and aggregation.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.alert: List, retrieve, and dismiss cost alerts including budget alerts, anomaly alerts, and credit alerts.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.view: Create and manage saved cost analysis views that can be shared and bookmarked.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.scheduledaction: Create scheduled cost report actions that send cost analysis emails on a schedule.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.dimension: Enumerate available dimension values for use in cost queries and filters.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.forecast: Generate cost forecasts for a given scope and time period.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.benefitrecommendation: Get AI-generated purchase recommendations for Azure reservations and savings plans.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.benefitutilizationsummary: Retrieve utilization summaries for reservations and savings plans.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.costallocationrule: Create and manage cost allocation rules to distribute shared costs to consuming departments.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.pricesheet: Download price sheets for invoices or billing periods.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.setting: Get and update Cost Management settings at the subscription or billing scope.

services.description: Manage Azure Reserved VM Instances and reservation orders.
services.detailedDescription: Purchase, manage, and exchange Azure Reserved VM Instances and other reservation types. Covers reservation order lifecycle, reservation updates (scope, quantity), split/merge operations, archive/unarchive, refund calculations, and exchange operations. Requires Reservation Administrator or Reservation Purchaser role.

resourceDescriptions.reservation: Individual reservations within a reservation order
resourceDescriptions.reservationorder: Reservation orders containing one or more reservations
resourceDescriptions.catalog: Available reservation SKUs and term options
resourceDescriptions.appliedreservationlist: Subscriptions that a reservation applies to

resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservation: List, update, split, merge, archive, and unarchive reservations. Check available scopes for a reservation and view revision history.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.reservationorder: Calculate costs, purchase, list, and manage reservation orders. Change the billing directory for an order.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.catalog: Retrieve available reservation SKUs, terms, and pricing for a location and resource type.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.appliedreservationlist: List subscriptions that benefit from shared-scope reservations.

services.description: Manage Azure Management Groups for organizing subscriptions into a hierarchy.
services.detailedDescription: Create and manage management groups to organize Azure subscriptions. Covers management group CRUD, subscription association, hierarchy settings, entity listing, and tenant-level operations. Requires Management Group Contributor or Owner role at the target scope.

resourceDescriptions.managementgroup: Management groups for organizing subscriptions into a governance hierarchy
resourceDescriptions.entity: All management groups and subscriptions visible to the current user
resourceDescriptions.tenantbackfill: Tenant backfill operations for adding subscriptions to management groups

resourceDetailedDescriptions.managementgroup: Create, update, and delete management groups. Retrieve descendants (child groups and subscriptions) and list all groups in the tenant.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.subscription: Add or remove subscriptions from management groups.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.hierarchysetting: Manage tenant-level settings that control default management group and new subscription placement.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.entity: List all management group entities (groups and subscriptions) accessible to the caller across the tenant hierarchy.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.tenantbackfill: Start or check the status of a tenant backfill operation that adds all subscriptions to management groups.

services.description: Manage Azure Lighthouse registration assignments and definitions for delegated resource management.
services.detailedDescription: Azure Lighthouse (Managed Services) enables service providers to manage customer resources through delegated access. Covers registration definitions (service offers) and registration assignments (delegations active on a scope). Requires Owner role to create delegations.

resourceDescriptions.registrationdefinition: Registration definitions describing the managed service offer and authorizations
resourceDescriptions.registrationassignment: Registration assignments activating a managed service delegation on a scope

resourceDetailedDescriptions.registrationdefinition: Create and manage registration definitions that define which managing tenant principals get access to the customer scope and with which roles.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.registrationassignment: Create and delete registration assignments that activate a delegation. Listing shows all active delegations at a scope.
resourceDetailedDescriptions.marketplaceregistrationdefinition: List and retrieve managed service definitions published through Azure Marketplace.
